modal.title: Settings
modal.subtitle: Tune gameplay, visuals, audio, and multiplayer defaults.

visual.title: Visual
visual.showOpponentBoard: Show opponent's board on HUD hover
visual.cardPreviewDelayHint: Wait this long after hovering a card before the preview appears.

cardPreviewHint.follow: The enlarged preview follows your cursor as you hover a card.
cardPreviewHint.side: The preview docks to the edge of the screen so it never covers the board.
cardPreviewHint.shift: The preview only appears while you hold Shift, like Tabletop Simulator.

flexLayout.title: Flex Layout
flexLayout.description: Drag panels and HUDs anywhere, and resize the board zones.
flexLayout.hint: Drag any panel to move it. Drag the glowing bars to resize zones.

layout2.label: Layout 2
layout2.description: A larger battlefield with tucked-away hands.

multiplayer.title: Multiplayer
multiplayer.serverSelectionNote: Server selection moved to the lobby — open Multiplayer and use the server chip (or "Pick server" in P2P mode) to switch regions, configure a self-hosted instance, or test connectivity.

sync.title: Cloud Sync
sync.description: Sign in to sync your decks, preferences, and feed subscriptions across devices. Your data lives in your account and updates automatically whenever it changes.
sync.conflictBody: This device and your cloud account both have data and we can't tell which is current. Pick which copy to keep — the other will be replaced.
sync.savesNote: Game saves and caches stay on this device.

data.title: Backup & Restore
data.description: Export bundles your preferences, imported decks, and feed subscriptions into a single JSON file. Import restores them on another machine. IndexedDB caches (feed cache, audio cache, saved games) are not included — those rebuild automatically.
data.importModeMessage: Replace everything with the backup (destructive), or merge — keep existing decks and add new ones from the backup.
data.importConfirm:
Overwrite existing preferences and decks?

OK: replace everything with the backup (destructive).
Cancel: merge — keep existing decks, add new ones from the backup.

resetAll.confirm: Reset all preferences to defaults? This clears every setting in this dialog.

pacing.title: Pacing
pacing.animationSpeedDescription: Master speed — higher is faster. Full-right skips animations entirely.
pacing.hint: Per-category sliders multiply on top of Animation Speed. Double-click any slider — or tap the <glyph>↺</glyph> next to it — to reset.

descriptions.effects: Spell casts, zone changes, deaths, life changes, counters, tap/untap.
descriptions.combat: Combat damage timing — how long blockers and attackers linger before damage resolves.

artChain.emptyState: Using default Scryfall art. Add rules below to customize.
artChain.unreachable: Rules below "{{rule}}" are unreachable — it always matches.
artChain.rulesPriorityNote: Rules are tried top-to-bottom. The first match wins. “Source Printing” uses the set from a draft pack or deck import when available. Per-card overrides (right-click in deck builder) always take priority.
